text:
- PRE_ICL_INP_1M_COPAY_TIER_09. 

During 2008- 2010 there were only seven tiers (i.e., variables PRE_ICL_INP_1M_COPAY_TIER_08 and 
PRE_ICL_INP_1M_COPAY_TIER_09 were not applicable). For 2011 and later, there were only six tiers 
(i.e., variable called PRE_ICL_INP_1M_COPAY_TIER_07 was not applicable after 2010). Starting in 
2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INP are currently referred to as 
standard retail pharmacies. There is no change in the meaning of the variable,
